query: SELECT availableCash, initialCapital FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1; SELECT COUNT(*) as openPositions FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open'; SELECT COUNT(*) as trades FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1; SELECT COUNT(*) as snapshots FROM paperEquitySnapshots WHERE userId=1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT availableCash, initialCapital FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1; SELECT COUNT(*) as openPositions FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open'; SELECT COUNT(*) as trades FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1; SELECT COUNT(*) as snapshots FROM paperEquitySnapshots WHERE userId=1;
